questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Disk Scheduling?
options: Inefficient scaling of FCFS, SSTF, SCAN, C-SCAN head movement optimizations.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of FCFS, SSTF, SCAN, C-SCAN head movement optimizations.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how FCFS, SSTF, SCAN, C-SCAN head movement optimizations scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
